llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 12.1 and 12.2 pulled per staff request for additional time. Item 12.3 (Ratification of Employment Agreement with Dr. Christian Rubalcaba) moved earlier, to be taken right after public comment and before item 10 (Discussion Items).
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Does anyone want to move that we approve the consent items? I'll second. All those in favor? Aye.
